---
title: "Reading for Lecture 4a"
---


- [ ] [Wilson, G., Bryan, J., Cranston, K., Kitzes, J., Nederbragt, L., & Teal, T. K. (2017). Good enough practices in scientific computing. PLoS computational biology, 13(6), e1005510.](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1005510)
